Aspartame.effects: Migraines, potential cancer links, neurological effects
Aspartame.found_in: Diet sodas, sugar-free gum, low-calorie desserts

MSG.effects: Headaches, nausea, obesity risk with overconsumption
MSG.found_in: Instant noodles, chips, fast food seasonings

High Fructose Corn Syrup.effects: Diabetes risk, obesity, fatty liver disease

Sodium Nitrite.found_in: Processed meats, bacon, sausages, hot dogs

Potassium Bromate.effects: Carcinogen, kidney damage (banned in EU/India partially)

Carrageenan.found_in: Dairy alternatives, ice cream, deli meats

Sodium Benzoate.effects: Hyperactivity, potential carcinogen with Vitamin C

Acesulfame K.found_in: Diet drinks, protein shakes, sugar-free foods

TBHQ.effects: Nausea, delirium at high doses, possible carcinogen

Titanium Dioxide.effects: Potential DNA damage, gut inflammation (banned in EU)

Partially Hydrogenated Oil.effects: Trans fats: heart disease, stroke, diabetes

Palm Oil.effects: High in saturated fat, environmental concerns

Maida.effects: Spikes blood sugar, lacks fiber/nutrients, digestive issues
